product_overview: A small e-commerce frontend with authentication, product catalog, cart and checkout flows. This PRD focuses on verifying and testing all user-facing forms and flows (signin, signup, cart, checkout) as requested in the raw PRD (page 1).
core_goals: Validate authentication flows (login and registration) including client validation and server error handling.
Ensure product browsing, add-to-cart and cart management work across /shop, /shop/[id], and /cart.
Verify checkout requires authentication and completes order creation with shipping details and payment handling on /checkout.
Surface and document common error states: invalid credentials, validation errors, empty cart, payment failures, and already-registered email.
Provide deterministic, step-by-step user flows for automated and manual testing using the app routes.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allow users to sign in with email and password and be redirected to their account dashboard. Handles validation and server-side authentication errors.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> Receive 200 from /api/auth/login -> Redirect to /account -> See account dashboard

Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field with wrong password -> Click Login button to submit -> Receive 401 from /api/auth/login -> See invalid credentials error message
Navigate to /login -> Leave email field empty -> Leave password field empty -> Click Login button to submit -> See validation errors for required fields

features.name: User Registration (Signup)
features.description: Allow new users to register with a name/email/password. Validate inputs client-side and handle server responses for duplicate accounts or validation failures.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Register button -> Receive 201 from /api/auth/register -> Redirect to /account -> See account dashboard

Navigate to /register -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field (already registered) -> Fill password input field -> Click Register button -> Receive 409 from /api/auth/register -> See email already in use error message
Navigate to /register -> Fill email field with invalid format -> Fill password field with too-short password -> Click Register button -> See validation error messages for email and password

features.name: Purchasing an Item (Add to Cart -> Checkout)
features.description: Browse products, add items to cart, review cart contents, and complete checkout with shipping details and payment. Checkout requires the user to be authenticated (/checkout auth_required).
user_flows: Navigate to /shop -> Browse product list -> Click product to open /shop/[id] -> Click Add to Cart -> See item added confirmation -> Navigate to /cart -> See item listed in cart -> Click proceed to Checkout -> Redirect to /checkout -> Fill shipping details -> Click Complete order -> Receive order confirmation -> See order confirmation page or order listed in /account

Navigate to /shop -> Click Add to Cart on a product -> Navigate to /cart -> Click proceed to Checkout -> Be redirected to /login because checkout requires authentication -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> Receive 200 from /api/auth/login -> Redirect back to /checkout -> Fill shipping details -> Click Complete order -> Receive order confirmation
Navigate to /cart -> See cart empty message -> Click proceed to Checkout -> See cannot proceed to checkout error or prompt to add items
Navigate to /checkout -> Fill shipping details -> Click Complete order -> Receive payment failure response -> See payment failure error message and option to retry

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials

features.name: Purchasing an Item
features.description: Add item to cart and checkout
user_interactions: Browse shop and click Add to Cart
